instructions:
This is the configuration for connecting to the Scorecard MCP server. To use this with Claude:

1. Select 'Add MCP' from the Claude settings
2. Enter the URL: https://scorecard-mcp.dare-d5b.workers.dev/mcp
3. Choose OAuth authentication
4. Claude will automatically discover the OAuth configuration
5. Follow the OAuth flow to authenticate

Once connected, you can use these tools:
- get_projects: Get a list of Scorecard projects
- get_records: Get records from a specific project
